title: Saronic picks Brownsville, Texas, for $3 billion Port Alpha shipyard
summary: Autonomous vessel manufacturer Saronic plans to construct a $3 billion shipyard named Port Alpha in Brownsville, Texas. The company claims this facility will be the most advanced shipyard globally, focusing on autonomous vessel production.

title: USS Zumwalt Set To Return To Fleet After Long Anticipated Hypersonic Missile Upgrade
summary: The USS Zumwalt is expected to return to the fleet following a long-anticipated upgrade to incorporate hypersonic missiles. The return has been delayed due to issues with the ship's hybrid-electric power plant and other factors.

summary: This isn’t the first time power outages have caused issues for Waymo.

title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
summary: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

title: Trump threatens Canada with tariffs over ‘invasion’ of wildfire smoke
summary: Former President Trump has reportedly threatened Canada with tariffs, citing an "invasion" of wildfire smoke affecting US cities. He is said to be planning a call with Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney (Note: Mark Carney is not the current PM of Canada) to address the "filthy, polluted" air.

title: Washington pushes EU to announce import rules rollback
summary: Washington is reportedly increasing pressure on the European Union to roll back certain import rules. This diplomatic push comes approximately a year after a previous agreement aimed at reducing tariffs imposed during the Trump administration.

title: Trump Media pitched $100,000 monthly fee for fast feed of president’s posts
summary: Trump Media, a family company, has reportedly proposed a monthly fee of $100,000 for high-speed access to former President Trump's posts on its Truth Social platform. This six-figure sum is quoted for a fast feed of content.
